ksa_text: Ability to manage the full data lifecycle including collection, curation, transformation, and assurance to ensure data quality at each stage.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: ability maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data quality", "data lifecycle"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4151); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation present: 1 match(es) in DE job postings or certification scope. Skill appears in DE role descriptions — sufficient to uphold.
